title: 3D SPAWN EGGS
description: Add 3D spawn eggs while keeping the original 2D sprites
body:
![3d eggs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d5790408bc681b3f32f981163c3ca67ab084b5.png)

-  **A Resource Pack That Makes All Spawn Eggs 3D keeping the original 2D sprites.**
-  **Works in Vanilla without any modifications necessary.**
